Comment (context for translators): label for buttons that can switch the map view mode

Translation: ハイパースペース離脱
ハイパースペースに入る

Comment (context for translators): action verb on a button that executes a hyperjump

Translation: ハイパージャンプ不可
進行中のシャトルの探査から帰還するのをお待ちください。
輸送機が作業を完了するまでお待ちください。
紫色の光を放っている希少なサーメットクリスタルだ。物理的な強靭さとエーテル的なエネルギーをあわせ持っている。
フェージウムから製造される小型のパワーユニットだ。放出するエネルギーをハイパージャンプの燃料として利用する。
ハイパースペース用のエンジンが無効です。

Comment (context for translators): Label for hyperdrive engine readiness percentage
Label for the number of available hyperjumps

Translation: Click the {0} in the Starmap, then select {1}.
Comment (context for translators): {0} is Hyperjump Relay name {1} is the menu option name you have to select to use it

Translation: A massive space structure that generates a powerful energy field, allowing ships with insufficient engines to perform long-range hyperjumps.
Damaged workers can get repaired in a Repair Station. It would be wise to have one available.
There are some ore deposits nearby. Use a Shuttle to launch an Expedition.
We can't stay in this sector forever. Perform a short range Hyperjump to explore the current space region.
Performing a short range Hyperjump requires a Fusion Drive fueled by Fusion Cell.
Trade is essential for acquiring needed materials and resources. Find a Space Station and execute a trade.
It's time to explore the rest of the Universe. Find a Hyperjump Relay and perform a long range Hyperjump.
Open Starmap, then click the Space Station, select the Trade option and exchange some goods.
A rare mineral that generates breathable atmosphere by catalyzing gas reactions.
An rare amber-like crystal that reshapes the terrain around itself by manipulating geological forces.
A rare sparkling crystal that releases concentrated nutrients, dramatically accelerating plant growth when applied to soil.
A rare mineral that catalyzes the conversion of oxygen into water, facilitating the synthesis of H₂O from atmospheric oxygen.
Operate a small ship with human-only crew. A difficult start recommended for experienced players.
We are near a Star. Solar panel output is increased by {0}, but the ship will be accumulating heat (~{1} per hour).
Comment (context for translators): {0} is percentage; {1} is degrees celsius or farenheit

Translation: A spore-launching organism that rapidly propels its sticky spores toward any nearby surface, mimicking a bio-weapon capable of covering entire areas over time.
Sensors have detected the presence of an alien lifeform in this sector. Caution is advised.
{0} is now available. You can now order items to be delivered to your ship at a premium cost.
The goods will be delivered to your ship in a {0}.
This action is not allowed during a Hyperjump. Exit Hyperspace first.
You have left the delivery location. Return to the original location or the order delivery will fail!
Warning. The selected space region is difficult and may not have easy access to resources required for early game. Are you sure you want to start here?
Human colonists need entertainment to maintain their mental health. Let's provide some facilities for that.
We can use this Shuttle for mining expeditions. It would allow us to establish a resource-processing pipeline and produce essential materials for rebuilding our ship.

Comment (context for translators): label for a button that creates a new order for a device to produce something

Translation: You can also order some raw materials at the Online Shop in the Wallet overlay.
A lifeless asteroid floating in space.
{0} research is required to enable this functionality
Comment (context for translators): {0} is research node name. for example Stock Market

Translation: This Stasis Array is dangerously unstable. Colonists will wake up with severe physical and mental damage. Connect this Stasis Array to electricity ASAP.
Colonists will require oxygen and warmth to survive after waking up from stasis. We must oxygenate and heat the rooms where the Stasis Arrays are located.
Consult the Heat overlay to monitor the temperature increase around {0}. Build more Heaters if necessary. This step will be completed when the average room temperature reaches {1}.
Comment (context for translators): {0} is device name {1} is temperature value

Translation: Consult the Oxygen overlay to monitor the increase in oxygen levels around {0}. Build more Oxygen Pumps if necessary. This step will be completed when the average oxygen level in the room reaches {1}.
Comment (context for translators): {0} is device name {1} is oxygen value

Translation:
Select the dead bodies and use the {0} action in the UI to order their processing. This step will be completed once all dead bodies are disposed of.

The fastest way to select multiple dead bodies is by using the being group widgets in the top right.
Comment (context for translators): {0} will be button name saying Dispose

Translation: We must process the dead bodies to acquire Protein for feeding the surviving colonists. Additionally, some of the fallen colonists may be infected with Alien Parasites. The bodies of these colonists should be processed as a top priority. You can check if a dead colonist is infected by examining their Conditions in the UI.
Scanning is not available in Hyperspace.
A large group of adjacent Sectors.
A region of drifting rocks and debris, scattered with resources for mining.
Radar scans adjacent space sectors and can search for specific resource deposits. It's highly recommended to have one.
This space sector might hold something of interest. Visit to discover what awaits.
A matter-transfer device designed for trading with ships and space stations.
Trade Portal is required for this trade
A cluster of Space Stations interested in exchanging goods.
The Ship Computer produces heat. You can replace sections of the floor with Frames that have ventilation holes, or build additional Heat Sinks.
We will eventually run out of materials; therefore, we must establish ways to produce them.
The ores we mine during expeditions must be smelted into plates and ingots. Let’s set up this process.
The work spot and input/output ports must remain unobstructed.
We're running low on {0}. Use the Codex to identify the ingredients and produce more. Some materials can be acquired through mining expeditions or purchased from the Online Shop or at Space Stations.
{0} had an accident while cooking {1} at {2}.
Comment (context for translators): {0} is being name; {1} is meal name; {2} is cooking station

Translation: {0} experienced a critical malfunction. A fuse upgrade would have reduced the severity of the side effects.
Significant device damage was avoided due to the installed fuse. Replace the fuse if possible.
A consumable fuse that prevents side effects from device malfunctions.

Comment (context for translators): {0} will be a robot or device name

Translation: This robot is currently being hacked. Once the process is complete, it may turn hostile.
ハッキングされている
Comment (context for translators): as in 'hacking in progress' or 'currently being hacked'
Conditions that have not yet developed, but are in progress

Translation:
The telescope has detected a potentially habitable planet in {0} Region, {1} Sector. We should set our course there when possible.

Terraforming may be necessary to make the planet safe for human colonists. I suggest prioritizing research on Terraforming technology.

Comment (context for translators): For requiring to open a storage capsule before performing another action

Translation: This being is preoccupied with something important and will temporarily ignore your orders.
This region does not have a {0}. To reach it, you need an engine that enables long-range hyperjumps ({1}).
このセクターにはなにも存在しないようだ

Comment (context for translators): warning for trying to move in hyperspace while not in it

Translation: ハイパードライブ停止中

Comment (context for translators): label next to number of hyperdrives that are currently running (working)

Translation: Hyperdrives can only recharge outside of Hyperspace.
Once you enter Hyperspace, at least one hyperdrive must start running before you can perform a jump.

Comment (context for translators): {0} is the condition name, {1} is percentage. example: Developing depression (23%)

Translation: Depression develops when the Fun need isn't satisfied for extended periods. Build entertainment facilities and add decorations to prevent this.
This sector has a permanent Magnetic Storm. Some electrical devices will experience intermittent issues.
This sector has a permanent Dust Storm. Solar panel output will be reduced.
A high-power version of the Fusion Cell, suitable for long-range hyperjumps.
ハイパージャンプ準備中
